title: Anvil Workbench plugin capability profile v1
description: A reviewed, version-pinned, digest-bearing allowlist scoping which installed plugin tools one project or chat may enable (R005). It only ENABLES installed, catalog-reviewed plugins referenced by id and digest; it can never install a plugin, mint a tool, grant a credential, or introduce a new privilege. Every plugin and tool is named by a pinned id/digest, so an actor can enable only what the operator already reviewed and installed. Every object is closed. All prose is untrusted display data, never control instructions.

binding.description: A capability profile can only enable installed plugins; it is never an install, grant, or privilege-minting instrument.

plugins.description: The installed plugins this profile may enable, each pinned by id and reviewed catalog digest. `enabled_tools` names the subset of that plugin's tools the actor may enable.
